subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O God of Names and Creator of heaven! I beseech Thee by that Name through which Thou didst subdue all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا اله الاسماء و فاطر السماء اسئلک بالاسم الذی به سخرت الاشیاء و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
